caption: A brightly lit bathroom is shown, featuring a glass-enclosed shower on the left, a dark brown vanity with a white countertop and two silver faucets, and a large rectangular mirror mounted on the wall above. A light-colored curtain hangs to the right of the vanity. In the reflection of the mirror, a brown door is visible. The camera pans slightly, moving from a view centered on the vanity and shower toward the right, revealing more of the room. A white bathtub edge is visible at the bottom of the scene. No people are present in the bathroom. The scene remains consistent in lighting and composition, with only a subtle shift in perspective as the camera moves, providing a wider view of the vanity area and the curtain.
